news.headline: Israeli Military Spokesperson: There is a possibility that Hamas leader Sinwar has been eliminated.
Mawson Infrastructure Group Inc. releases September 2024 operational report.
Finnish authority approved transfer of Secto Automotive's used car business to Kamux. Showrooms involved in the transfer.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in Espoo, Finland, the Finnish Competition and Consumer Authority has given the green light for Kamux Corporation to take over Secto Automotive's used car business. This includes the showrooms located in Friisilä, Espoo, and Petikko, Vantaa. This approval marks a significant development in the automotive industry and solidifies Kamux's presence in the market. Stay tuned for further updates on this exciting transition.

news.headline: DCN Dx will showcase Lateral Flow Development Services and miniDxR at MEDICA 2024 with contract IVD services and reader.
news.summary: DCN Dx will be showcasing their contract in vitro diagnostic (IVD) services and customizable lateral flow reader at Booth Hall 3 / D25-2 in CARLSBAD, Calif., starting on October 17, 2024. This event marks their position as a top player in the industry for contract lateral flow assay (LFA) IVD development and manufacturing. Attendees can learn more about their advanced services and products for diagnostic clinical purposes.

news.headline: Prescient Healthcare Group has named Jason McKenna as its new CEO on Oct. 17, 2024. #biopharma #news
news.summary: Prescient Healthcare Group, a top biopharma product and portfolio strategy firm based in London, has named Jason McKenna as its latest Chief Executive Officer (CEO). The announcement was made on October 17, 2024. McKenna will be taking on the role at the company, guiding its strategic direction and operations. This move comes as part of the company's efforts to reinforce its leadership team for continued growth and success.

news.headline: 53% of connected TV device owners prefer staying within the same product ecosystem. Future of Video workshop on Nov 19 will feature insights from various organizations.
news.summary: An upcoming pre-conference workshop, "Future of Video," taking place on November 19, will showcase valuable insights from prominent industry experts. Scheduled speakers include representatives from leading organizations such as ATSC, FAST Alliance, Cineverse, Vevo, and more. The event, organized by Parks Associates, is set to be held in Dallas. This workshop is part of the broader research initiative titled "Consumers and Streaming Services Viewing," which aims to delve into current trends and behaviors related to streaming services. Mark your calendars for this informative session on the future of video viewing.

news.headline: FNB Corp. will report Q3 earnings on Oct. 17, expected EPS of 35 cents, revenue of $410.78 million. Dividend yield is 3.33%.
news.summary: FNB Corp. (NYSE:FNB) is set to report its third-quarter earnings on Oct. 17, with analysts forecasting earnings of 35 cents per share, down from 40 cents per share in the previous year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $410.78 million, up from $403.35 million a year earlier. The company currently offers an annual dividend yield of 3.33%, with a quarterly dividend amount of 12 cents per share (48 cents annually). Investors interested in earning $500 monthly from FNB would need to aim for a yearly target of $6,000. More detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sip Herbals launches 2024 Holiday Sip Box Gift Set for alternative coffee drinkers; includes cozy, caffeine-free comfort.
news.summary: A new holiday gift bundle is being introduced by Sip Herbals in Portland, Oregon on October 17, 2024. Following the popularity of their Pumpkin Spiced Latte 'Faux Joe' this fall, the caffeine-free herbal coffee substitute showcased on Shark Tank is now offering cozy and comforting options. The gift bundle aims to provide customers with a delightful selection of caffeine-free beverages.

news.headline: Advanced Data Systems Corp introduces MedicsSpeak® and MedicsListen® for AI-driven data input in MedicsCloud EHR.
news.summary: In Paramus, New Jersey, on October 17, 2024, Advanced Data Systems Corp. (ADS) announced the launch of MedicsSpeak and MedicsListen as integrated AI features in their ONC-Certified MedicsCloud EHR platform. MedicsSpeak revolutionizes documentation methods during encounters, while MedicsListen enhances real-time communication between healthcare professionals. This innovation aims to streamline the documentation process and improve patient care.

news.headline: Janet Yellen will caution that Trump's tariff plans could increase inflation in a speech criticizing his economic proposals.
news.summary: The Secretary of the Treasury intends to speak out against the economic policies proposed by former President Donald J. Trump in a forthcoming address.

news.headline: Curly Wolf hosts Harvest Moon concert event with headliners Marc E. Bassy, Skizzy Mars, and Skeez in Reno, Nevada.
news.summary: Curly Wolf, the leading Americana brand, is hosting Harvest Moon, their second annual fall event in RENO, Nevada on October 17, 2024. This unique gathering will feature a blend of soulful, hip-hop, and alternative music genres for an unforgettable experience during Autumn.

news.headline: Karin Adams releases new book for aspiring novelists, based on in-person workshops, to critical acclaim. (Characters: 97)
news.summary: Explore the compelling adaptation of Karin Adams' renowned in-person writing workshops into book form, aiding in conquering writer's block and fostering creativity. Released in bookstores on Oct. 17, 2024, "The One Week Writing Workshop" encapsulates Adams' expertise and passion for writing. Embark on this literary journey in Winnipeg, MB, and unlock the potential for enriching your writing skills, as the book equips you with invaluable tools and techniques. Don't miss out on the opportunity to experience the magic of Adams' teachings, now conveniently available for all aspiring writers.

On October 17, 2024, in Toronto, Tulip, a top provider of retail clienteling software, introduced the Tulip Clienteling platform. This solution aims to enhance customer engagement and drive sales for retailers through personalized communication strategies.

news.headline: Huawei and partners release fgOTN White Paper for Electric Power at GITEX GLOBAL 2024 in Dubai. Promoting next-gen communication network standards.

By leveraging this opportunity, the company aims to further expand its reach and offer enhanced financial solutions to its customers. PayToMe.co's involvement in such events demonstrates its commitment to staying at the forefront of the financial technology sector.

news.headline: Victim named Pamela, killed in 1980, identified after 4 decades by FHD Forensics & G4J in partnership with Volusia County Sheriff's Office.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on October 17, 2024, FHD Forensics and its sister entity, Genealogy For Justice™ (G4J), working alongside the Volusia County Sheriff's Office, disclosed that an unidentified murder victim discovered in Florida back in 1980 was successfully identified in March using genetic analysis.

news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on October 17, 2024, an announcement was made by Special Needs Group®/Special Needs at Sea® (SNG) - a prominent medical equipment and supply company. SNG is known as the top global provider for wheelchair, scooter, oxygen, and other special needs equipment rentals. The company has revealed their satisfaction with...

news.headline: nRichDX to showcase automation for liquid biopsy sample prep at AMP 2024 Annual Meeting, booth #1321.
news.summary: nRichDX®, a prominent player in liquid biopsy sample preparation, is set to showcase its cutting-edge automation technology and kits at exhibit booth #1321 in VANCOUVER, BC on October 17, 2024. Renowned for its Revolution Sample Prep System™ tailored for liquid biopsy applications, the company will unveil its newest offerings and share fresh data during the event. This move aims to highlight the company's position as an industry leader in liquid biopsy technology.

news.headline: Gracianna Winery's 2023 Westside Reserve Pinot Noir wins Best in Show at the 2024 Sonoma County Harvest Fair.
news.summary: Gracianna Winery in Sonoma County, California, solidifies their commitment to producing exceptional wines by revealing the outstanding success of their 2023 Westside Reserve Pinot Noir. The prestigious award received for this vintage highlights Gracianna's dedication to crafting world-class wines for those who appreciate quality. The renowned Pinot Noir has garnered praise and recognition in the industry, showcasing the winery's exceptional standards. This achievement underscores Gracianna's position as a reputable player in the wine industry, setting a high benchmark for their offerings.

news.headline: Transcript from Moleculin's KOL event on Acute Myeloid Leukemia available, Oct. 17, 2024, Nasdaq: MBRX.
news.summary: A company named Moleculin Biotech, Inc. (Nasdaq: MBRX), based in Houston, revealed on October 17, 2024, that they possess a diverse range of drug candidates designed to combat difficult tumors and viruses. This pharmaceutical company is currently in its later stages and offers a substantial portfolio.

news.headline: Elevance Health Inc. reports Q3 revenues of $44.7B, up 5.3% YOY, missing earnings expectations due to higher medical costs in Medicaid business.
news.summary: Elevance Health Inc. (NYSE: ELV) announced third-quarter revenues of $44.7 billion, marking a 5.3% increase from the previous year and surpassing the expected $43.33 billion. The growth was fueled by elevated premium yields in the Health Benefits segment and rising revenue from the CarelonRx product, although there was a decline in Medicaid business membership. The benefit expense ratio rose to 89.5%, up by 270 basis points, primarily due to a timing mismatch between Medicaid rates and member acuity. Despite challenges in the Medicaid sector, Elevance Health remains optimistic about the future earnings potential of its diverse operations. The company anticipates that Medicaid rates will eventually align with member requirements over time.

news.headline: Global asset performance management market valued at $2.90B in 2023, expected to reach $6.17B by 2031, growing at a CAGR of 9.9%. Growth driven by demand for digital solutions across industries such as oil & gas, manufacturing, and chemicals. APM systems leverage IoT for equipment reliability. (Source: https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2024/10/17/2324835/0/en/The-Asset-Performance-Management-Market-size-is-expected-to-value-at-6-17-Billion-by-2031-Says-a-New-Research-Report-by-SkyQuest-Technology.html)
news.summary: The global asset performance management market was valued at $2.90 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $6.17 billion by 2031, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.9% from 2024 to 2031. The market is expected to expand due to increasing demand for digital solutions in industries like oil & gas, manufacturing, and chemicals to reduce operational costs. Asset Performance Management systems collect data from various assets using sensors and analyze it through data analysis software to streamline asset management processes. The use of mobile solutions and geographic information system solutions, as well as leveraging industrial internet of things, are driving factors for the growth of the market.

Grecian Delight | Kronos donates over 150,000 servings of food & supplies for hurricane relief efforts.
news.summary: Grecian Delight | Kronos, a prominent supplier of Greek and Mediterranean food products based in Elk Grove Village, Illinois, made a remarkable contribution on October 17, 2024. They donated more than 60,000 pounds of various items like Global Proteins, Pita Bread, and Sandwich Kits to aid in supporting a significant cause.

news.headline: Desert Donuts opens first franchise shop in Colorado's Greenwood Village on October 5, 2024, marking expansion milestone.
news.summary: On October 5, 2024, Desert Donuts, a popular Arizona dessert shop known for its made-to-order cake donuts, celebrated the opening of its inaugural franchise in Greenwood Village, Colorado. This expansion marks a significant achievement for the company.

news.headline: Gérard Bertrand launches French Cancan organic sparkling wines in New York, Oct. 17, 2024. Introducing Brut Nature collection.
news.summary: Acclaimed French winemaker Gérard Bertrand, along with his daughter Emma Bertrand, has launched French Cancan, a new collection of organic and Brut Nature sparkling wines in the dynamic U.S. wine market. The collection is set to make a significant impact in the industry.

news.headline: VW ID. Buzz named 2025 Green Van of the Year. Fiat 500e, Ford Maverick also win awards.
news.summary: Volkswagen's ID. Buzz has been honored as the 2025 Green Van of the Year™ by Green Car Journal in Los Angeles on October 17, 2024. This recognition signifies the culmination of the electric model's eagerly awaited arrival in U.S. markets after years of anticipation. Alongside the ID. Buzz, other recipients were awarded titles in the recent edition of the magazine.

news.headline: Sales Focus Inc. introduces Alliance Partner Program for companies seeking sales expansion on Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: Sales Focus Inc. has recently introduced its Alliance Partner Program aimed at assisting companies in enhancing their sales capabilities. The renowned sales outsourcing company based in Charleston, S.C., made the announcement on October 17, 2024. Sales Focus Inc. (SFI), a well-known global sales outsourcing provider, is thrilled to debut this program. The initiative is intended to support firms in boosting their sales resources and expanding their outreach.

news.headline: Geek+ deploys Goods-to-Person robots at THG Fulfil's Omega facility in Warrington, enhancing warehouse automation.
news.summary: In Warrington, England, on October 17, 2024, Geekplus, a prominent provider of mobile robot and smart logistics solutions, introduced a series of Goods-to-Person robots at THG Fulfil's Omega facility. THG Fulfil, affiliated with THG Ingenuity, specializes in fulfillment and courier management services. This deployment marks an important step in enhancing efficiency and automation in THG Fulfil's operations.

news.headline: AIP to acquire PPG's Architectural Coatings Business in US & Canada to accelerate growth. NYC, Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: American Industrial Partners ("AIP"), a key player in the industrial sector, recently disclosed their intention to drive substantial growth in the United States and Canada through a significant investment. This move comes on the heels of the company's well-established foundation and the success of its renowned legacy brands. The investment is expected to pave the way for accelerated profitable expansion in the region. The news was officially shared on October 17, 2024, in New York City.

news.headline: Bach Talk Podcast by BSSL returns for second season, offering listeners a peek behind the curtain to the timeless world of Bach.
news.summary: Saint Louis, October 17, 2024 - The Bach Society of Saint Louis (BSSL) is launching the second season of Bach Talk, a podcast providing insights into the timeless world of Bach. This initiative aims to offer a unique behind-the-scenes look to a global audience.

news.headline: New Floor & Decor store opens in Daytona Beach, FL. Check out their selection of home improvement products.
news.summary: Yesterday, a new report was released stating that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% in 2021. This growth is mainly driven by the recovery in major economies, such as the US, China, and the Eurozone. The report also highlighted that emerging markets and developing economies are expected to grow by 6.7% this year, significantly higher than the 3.3% growth recorded in 2020. However, the report cautioned that the uneven distribution of vaccines and the emergence of new COVID-19 variants pose risks to the economic recovery. Unemployment rates are also expected to remain elevated in many countries, with an estimated 100 million people at risk of falling back into extreme poverty. The report calls for continued policy support and international cooperation to ensure a more inclusive and sustainable recovery.

news.headline: Convex partners with EXL to enhance operations; focuses on efficiency and customer experience.
news.summary: A well-known data analytics and digital operations company, EXL, recently announced it has been chosen by Convex Group Limited, an international specialty insurer and reinsurer, for a lengthy collaboration aimed at enhancing the speed of their business operations. This initiative is set to enhance efficiency and customer satisfaction by implementing a more cost-efficient, adaptable, and robust operating structure.

news.headline: Seek investment opportunities for $10,000, advice from financial sources for optimal returns at the present moment.
Ambac's subsidiary, Beat Capital Partners, launches Fallow Grove Insurance Services specializing in middle market property, with A+ rating.
news.summary: A subsidiary of Ambac, Beat Capital Partners, has recently introduced Fallow Grove Insurance Services in Charlotte, North Carolina. This new venture aims to provide specialized insurance services to the local community. This development signifies a significant step in Ambac's expansion strategy, as they continue to diversify their offerings in the insurance sector. This move is expected to create employment opportunities and contribute to the local economy.

news.headline: Azure Power in India refinanced over $500 million of debt in the current fiscal year through REC and HSBC, completing early bond payment.
news.summary: In the current financial year, Azure Power Global Limited, a top sustainable energy solutions provider and renewable power producer in India, has refinanced over $500 million in debt. This significant announcement was made in Gurugram, India on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Sabre Corp to webcast Q3 2024 earnings call on Oct 31 at 9 am ET. Management will discuss financial results.
news.summary: A technology company based in Southlake, Texas, Sabre Corporation, announced its plans to hold a live webcast for its third quarter earnings conference call on October 31, 2024, starting at 9:00 a.m. ET. The event will provide insights into the financial performance of the company during that quarter and offer forward-looking perspectives. Sabre Corporation, listed on the NASDAQ as SABR, aims to engage stakeholders and investors through this platform.

news.headline: Vonage launches AI-powered contact center experience, Vonage Contact Center (VCC) Intelligent Workspace, enhancing agent productivity, Ericsson acquires Vonage.
news.summary: In Holmdel, New Jersey on October 17, 2024, Vonage, a prominent player in cloud communications aiding businesses in enhancing their digital strategies and a subsidiary of Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC), introduced the Vonage Contact Center (VCC) Intelligent Workspace. This innovative platform utilizes artificial intelligence to offer a dynamic new interface for agents, revolutionizing their work experience.

news.headline: Former CIA COO Andy Makridis joins DXC Technology as top advisor in public sector, showing commitment to innovation.
news.summary: DXC Technology, a prominent global technology services provider listed on the NYSE as DXC, has demonstrated its dedication to outcome-driven innovation for clients by appointing Andy Makridis as the new Chief Operating Officer. This move, announced on October 17, 2024, in Ashburn, Virginia, signifies the company's commitment to enhancing client services. DXC Technology, a Fortune 500 company, continues to prioritize innovation and client satisfaction in its operations.

news.headline: Potomac Bancshares, Inc. declares quarterly dividend in Charles Town, W.Va. (OTC:PTBS).
news.summary: In Charles Town, West Virginia, on October 17, 2024, the Board of Directors of Potomac Bancshares, Inc. announced a quarterly dividend. Potomac Bancshares, Inc. is the sole bank holding company for Bank of Charles Town, also known as The Community's Bank. The Company's stock is listed as OTC:PTBS. The decision was made during the October Board meeting.

news.headline: Honiture showcases pet-friendly innovations at GITEX & Canton Fair, emphasizing investment in cleaning technologies.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on October 17, 2024, Honiture announced plans to boost investment in pet and deep cleaning technologies. The company aims to deliver cutting-edge cleaning products for pet owners, emphasizing convenience and innovation. These advancements were showcased at GITEX as part of Honiture's commitment to enhancing cleaning solutions.

news.headline: DISCO welcomes Susan Garcia as General Counsel & Chief Compliance Officer effective Oct 14, 2024 - a leader in legal tech.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, DISCO (NYSE: LAW) revealed their latest addition to the team - Susan Garcia, who will take on the roles of General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer starting October 14, 2024. With a focus on AI-driven legal tech, DISCO operates in a space that navigates innovation, regulation, and data security. Garcia brings extensive experience in commercial software and risk management, positioning her well to contribute to DISCO's future growth.

news.headline: Clinch is now part of Amazon Ads Partner Network, able to optimize campaigns across Amazon properties.
news.summary: Clinch has received certification that allows it to enhance campaigns on specific Amazon owned platforms, including streaming TV, online video, display, and mobile inventory. This certification signifies that Clinch can optimize ad serving and personalization on these properties. The announcement was made in New York on Oct 17, 2024.

news.headline: Permira acquires Squarespace for $7.2 billion in all-cash transaction, removes it from NYSE. CEO retains majority of shares.
news.summary: Permira, a global investment firm, has finalized the acquisition of Squarespace, Inc. in an all-cash deal worth around $7.2 billion. Following the transaction, Squarespace has ceased trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The acquisition involved Squarespace Founder & CEO Anthony Casalena rolling over a significant portion of his stake in the company.

news.headline: Images in Motion Media Inc. in Sonoma, CA repurposes sets and puppets, blending creativity with sustainability.
news.summary: A company called Images in Motion Media Inc. in Sonoma, California is blending creativity with sustainability by repurposing sets and puppets. The studio, known for its TV puppetry, is taking recycling to a new level. As of October 17, 2024, they have managed to repurpose various materials, not limited to bottles and paper, to create their sets and puppets. This initiative showcases their commitment to promoting sustainability in their creative endeavors.

news.headline: Traders price in less Fed easing after retail sales and jobless claims numbers.
Pat Parelli to open Parelli Landing, a new horsemanship campus, in Johnsonville, SC in January 2025.
news.summary: In January 2025, Pat Parelli, renowned for his contributions to natural horsemanship, will inaugurate Parelli Landing: The Horseman's Academy in Johnsonville, South Carolina. This new consolidated year-round campus aims to provide comprehensive education and training in horsemanship. Scheduled to open after the announcement on October 17, 2024, this initiative is set to offer a unique learning experience for equestrians. The academy is poised to attract a diverse range of individuals interested in honing their horsemanship skills.

news.headline: LightPath Technologies will participate in LD Micro Main Event XVII on October 29, 2024. NASDAQ: LPTH, provider of optics, to attend conference.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, on October 17, 2024, LightPath Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: LPTH), a prominent supplier of advanced optics and imaging systems for defense and commercial uses, disclosed that its management has received an invitation. The company is recognized for its cutting-edge solutions in the industry.

news.headline: Non-profit jscreen focuses on proactive genetic screening to lower breast cancer risk. Promotes awareness during Breast Cancer Awareness Month.
news.summary: In observance of Breast Cancer Awareness Month, jscreen, a non-profit organization focused on preventing genetic diseases and cancer, is increasing its outreach efforts. The organization aims to educate the public about the importance of proactive measures.

news.headline: VFX expert Alan Chan debuts novel "Abundance," adding to his successful career in Hollywood. #AlanChan #Abundance #Hollywood
news.summary: In Dallas on October 17, 2024, Alan Chan, an acclaimed visual effects expert and writer-director, achieved a new milestone in his career. With a track record including contributions to numerous award-winning advertising campaigns, such as those recognized with Clio Awards, and to Academy Award-winning films, Chan's success is undeniable.
